backend/main.mo: Actor includes the MixinStorage module to provide blob storage functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report detailing a Turkish subtitle update and related files, components, and metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten collection of summaries for various frontend files describing components, hooks, and configs.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS layer defining color variables for light and dark themes with OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point loading the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing providers, layout structure, background, frequency list, player, and overlays.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React error boundary that catches runtime errors and displays a styled fallback with reload option.
frontend/src/components/BackgroundAmbian: Clears legacy background ambiance localStorage key on mount.
Popup for selecting background ambiance with dynamic positioning, theme colors, and localization.
frontend/src/components/DurationSelector: Editable duration selector popup using slider input with theme‑adaptive styling and close handling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer displaying privacy policy link and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/FrequencyCard.ts: Displays a frequency card with play controls and an optional add-to-playlist button, handling temporary checkmark states and disabled modes.
frontend/src/components/FrequencyList.ts: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the app header with theme‑adaptive styling, language and settings buttons, and localized labels.
frontend/src/components/KidsSleepSoundCa: Displays a kids' sleep sound card with localized title, play controls, and playlist interactions similar to FrequencyCard.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Empty file with no implemented content.
Provides a popup for selecting languages, calculates on‑screen positioning, and adapts styling based on the current theme.
frontend/src/components/MainPlayer.tsx: Implements the main audio player UI with play controls, duration and playlist popups, theme‑based styling, and dynamic item naming.
frontend/src/components/MoodSpace.tsx: Displays a selectable mood grid and shows recommended sounds based on the currently selected mood.
frontend/src/components/PeacefulSoundCar: UI card for a single peaceful sound with play/stop controls and an add-to-playlist button with temporary checkmark feedback.
frontend/src/components/PlayerAnimationO: Full‑screen canvas overlay rendering animated visuals based on the currently playing sound's frequency and visual intensity.
frontend/src/components/PlaylistPanel.ts: File is empty or not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/PlaylistPopup.ts: Popup showing the active playlist with theme‑based styling, item controls, and outside‑click/ESC closing behavior.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedSound: Displays mood‑based recommended sounds or frequencies with play, session start, and add‑to‑playlist actions and temporary checkmarks.
frontend/src/components/SessionPanel.tsx: File is empty or not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/SettingsPopup.ts: Settings popup with theme selection and dynamic positioning logic anchored to the settings button.
frontend/src/components/SoundWaveVisuali: Canvas-based animated particle and ring visualization driven by audio frequency, intensity, and theme configuration.
Renders themed background images and animated gradient overlays that pulse based on audio intensity.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelector.ts: Empty component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelectorPop: Popup for selecting visual themes with dynamic positioning, keyboard handling, and styled theme options.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedFrequency: Displays frequency, sound, and mood categories with theme-based styling and controls for playback, sessions, and playlists.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedPlaylistP: Empty component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedSessionPa: Session controller UI showing active session details, progress, and controls for pausing, resuming, and stopping.
frontend/src/hooks/UnifiedAudioManagerCo: Context that syncs main player state to the unified audio manager and exposes playback and audio state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates related queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioActivation.ts: Provides context to unlock and activate audio on first user interaction, managing visual indicators and persistent activation state.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioManager.ts: Empty file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundAmbiance: Manages looping ambiance audio using Web Audio API, handling play state, interruptions, persistence, and asset loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context, loading stored identities, handling login/logout, and exposing status helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.tsx: Stores and provides current UI language with persistence and translation access.
frontend/src/hooks/useMainPlayer.tsx: Maintains global audio playback state including queue, modes, timers, and controls for frequencies and sounds.
frontend/src/hooks/useMainPlayerAudioSyn: Empty file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlaylistManager.ts: Empty file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains no queries because app is fully client-side.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionManager.ts: Empty file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.tsx: Provides visual theme selection with persistence and a simple context API.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedAudioManage: Unified WebAudio and native Android audio manager handling frequency playback, sound IDs, intensity monitoring, and lifecycle cleanup.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedPlaylistMan: Manages a unified playlist of frequency and sound items, providing add/remove helpers and controlling playback state through the main player.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedSessionMana: Handles predefined meditation sessions by building frequency queues, managing timers, and syncing playback with session progression.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisualization.tsx: Provides a context for fullscreen visualization state with toggles and optional persistence.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, animations, and utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/ambianceAssets.ts: Maps ambiance types to audio asset paths and provides a helper for retrieving the correct file URL.
frontend/src/lib/androidAudioBridge.ts: Wraps Android WebView audio bridge calls with availability checks and safe play/stop functions.
frontend/src/lib/androidNativeSoundId.ts: Translates web sound IDs to Android native resource IDs using explicit mappings and fallback normalization.
frontend/src/lib/kidsSleepSounds.ts: Exports metadata for categorized kids sleep sounds including IDs, titles, and categories.
frontend/src/lib/meditationAnimationMapp: Defines animation types and maps frequencies or sound IDs to animation styles, plus returns configuration presets for each animation type.
frontend/src/lib/moodRecommendations.ts: Provides recommended frequencies and peaceful sounds for each mood type.
frontend/src/lib/moods.ts: Defines mood types and their UI metadata such as icons and glow colors.
frontend/src/lib/peacefulSounds.ts: Lists peaceful sound IDs with display titles for use in the UI.
frontend/src/lib/translations.ts: Defines language options and a large translation schema with localized strings for many UI sections.
frontend/src/lib/visualThemes.ts: Exports selectable visual theme options for the app’s UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that initializes React, query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the app.
frontend/src/startupDiagnostics.ts: Empty placeholder file for potential startup diagnostics.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending themes, colors, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, feature requests, and state for the FrequencyVerse app.
